title: coronilla vaginalis
intro: Coronilla vaginalis, also known as the clover or rattle, is a perennial herb belonging to the family Fabaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. Coronilla vaginalis is valued for its health benefits, such as relieving menstrual cramps, soothing digestive issues, and reducing anxiety and stress. The herbal preparations of Coronilla vaginalis typically involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures made from its leaves, flowers, or roots, which can be consumed as teas, capsules, or applied topically as creams or ointments.
